---
title: "Publications"
---

A list of my publications can also be found on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Iw0DI-IAAAAJ&hl=en).

<font size="2.5"> *+ denotes equal contribution*       *\# denotes trainee* </font>


## Under Review

**Schmidt, H.^+^***,* Tran, S.^+#^, Medaglia, J., Ulichney, V., & Helion, C. (preprint). Conversational linguistic features predict social network learning. *PsyArXiv*.\
[Online (preprint)](https://psyarxiv.com/fn4my/) \| [Data & Code](https://osf.io/8wqhb/)

\
Eckardt, D., Helion, C., **Schmidt, H.**, Chen, J., & Murty, V.P. (preprint). Storytelling changes the structure and perceived value of event memories. *Social Science Research Network*.\
[Online (preprint)](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4481365)

\
Ulichney, V., **Schmidt, H.**, & Helion, C. (preprint). Maybe the real prize is the friends we made along the way: Perceived support from friends enhances everyday emotional well-being in the U.S. and Japan. *PsyArXiv*.\
[Online (preprint)](https://psyarxiv.com/agc3v) \| [Data & Code](https://osf.io/f4kav/)

\
Mitchell, W.J., Stasiak, J., Martinez, S.A., Cliver, K., Gregory, D.F., Reisman, S., **Schmidt, H**., Murty, V.P., & Helion, C. (preprint). Emotion regulation strategy usage in a dynamic, high-intensity context. *PsyArXiv*.\
[Online (preprint)](https://psyarxiv.com/23wtz/) \| [Data & Code](https://osf.io/j5sku/)

## Unpublished

**Schmidt, H.** & Helion, C. (in prep.). Quantitative methods in affective science: Recent advances, theoretical implications, and future directions.

\
**Schmidt, H.**, Mitchell, W.J., & Helion, C. (in prep.). Emotion regulatory effects of emotion and content labeling in a naturalistic context.

## Selected Poster Presentations

Click [here](selected-posters.qmd){target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none"} to see a selection of my poster presentations.
All presentations are listed on my [CV](files/SchmidtCV-Website.pdf){target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none"}.

<!-- Add icon library -->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/4.7.0/css/font-awesome.min.css">

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://use.fontawesome.com/releases/v5.8.1/css/all.css" integrity="sha384-50oBUHEmvpQ+1lW4y57PTFmhCaXp0ML5d60M1M7uH2+nqUivzIebhndOJK28anvf" crossorigin="anonymous">

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.rawgit.com/jpswalsh/academicons/master/css/academicons.min.css">
